name: Prefab Industrial Building
description:
Prefab Industrial Building

Prefab industrial buildings are factory-made, steel-frame structures built for production, processing, and storage operations — delivered as a finished, multi-room building, not a bare shell. SAMAN manufactures them at our Bangalore and Delhi NCR units and installs them on site in a fraction of the time conventional construction takes.

What Is a Prefab Industrial Building?

A prefab industrial building is a pre-engineered steel structure — frame, insulated wall panels, and roof — fabricated in a factory and assembled on your site. Unlike a bare clear-span shed, it arrives as a finished, partitioned building with separate production, storage, and office zones ready for operations.

A finished 2,160 sq ft prefab industrial building sited on an industrial-estate plot, ready for operations.

This is the distinction most suppliers blur. A great deal of "industrial building" content online is really selling a clear-span shed: a steel skeleton with a roof and open floor. That is a different product. A prefab industrial building is the finished article — wired, partitioned, and usable from handover.

What You Get in SAMAN's 2,160 sq ft Industrial Building

Our reference industrial building is 60 × 36 × 14 ft — about 2,160 sq ft of covered area — priced at ₹24,25,000 (regular ₹24,50,000). That works out to roughly ₹1,123 per sq ft for a complete building, not a structure-only quote. The price covers the pre-engineered steel frame, insulated wall and roof panels, structural flooring, and a partitioned interior split into a working production floor, a store, and an office zone.

The configured 60×36×14 ft unit on a factory compound — a worker and tempo show its 14 ft clear height.

Most suppliers quote a wide per-sq-ft band and leave inclusions vague. We publish one configured unit so you can benchmark a real building against your requirement, then scale the span and height up or down from there. Larger production runs typically start at 1,000 sq ft and grow into the tens of thousands.

Sizing the Building Around Your Machinery & Material Flow

The number that decides most industrial layouts is clear height, not floor area. Our reference unit gives 14 ft of clear height — enough for stacked racking, overhead service lines, and most forklift work. Where heavier handling or taller equipment is involved, the frame is configured for greater height and wider unobstructed spans.

Inside the building: 14 ft clear height, racking, a forklift and a partitioned office under a mezzanine.

Inside, the building is laid out around how material actually moves: a roller shutter sized for your vehicles, a clear path from inward goods to the production floor, and partitioned zones that keep the office and store separate from the working area. A mezzanine floor can add usable area over the office or store without enlarging the footprint. The interior uses insulated panels to keep the working environment stable through Indian summers.

When You Need a Finished Building, Not a Bare Shed

If your operation needs only a covered, open floor — a single clear span for storage or a simple work bay — a clear-span industrial shed is the more economical choice, and that is a separate SAMAN product line. Choose a prefab industrial building instead when you need partitioned rooms, a finished interior, and combined production-plus-office use in one structure. The table below makes the call simple.

Goods moving through the roller shutter of a finished prefab industrial building in daily operation.

Aspect Prefab Industrial Building Clear-Span Shed
Structure Finished, partitioned building Open steel shell, one span
Interior Multi-room: production, store, office Single open floor
Best fit Combined operations under one roof Storage or simple covered work area
Buy from This page SAMAN industrial sheds line

Industrial Building or Manufacturing Facility — Matching Build to Process

There is a second fork in the decision. A prefab industrial building suits general industrial use — light assembly, processing, mixed production-and-storage. If your requirement is a process-led production plant — heavy machinery foundations, line-specific layouts, higher load and utility provisioning — that is a dedicated manufacturing facility, configured around the production process rather than general use. The rule of thumb: if the building serves your operation, this page fits; if the building is the production line, the manufacturing facility does.

From Order to Operational — Delivery & the Wider Prefab Range

Handed over and operational at dusk — the same configured building running in an industrial park.

Once your specification is confirmed, the building is fabricated, inspected, and dispatched within 15 to 21 working days, then erected on a prepared, level site. You arrange the foundation and power connection; we handle frame erection, panelling, and fit-out. Industrial buildings are one of several formats — offices, commercial blocks, and multi-storey structures sit alongside them in the full prefab building range if your project spans more than one use.

Prefab Industrial Building — FAQs

How much does a prefab industrial building cost?

SAMAN's configured 60 × 36 × 14 ft industrial building (≈2,160 sq ft) is ₹24,25,000 — about ₹1,123 per sq ft for a complete, partitioned building. Larger spans and added height adjust the figure; we quote per specification.

How fast can a prefab industrial building be installed?

The building is fabricated and dispatched within 15 to 21 working days of a confirmed order, then erected on your prepared site. Steel-frame prefab construction runs roughly 40% faster than equivalent RCC work.

Should I choose a prefab industrial building or a manufacturing facility?

Choose a prefab industrial building for general industrial use — processing, light assembly, mixed production and storage. Choose a dedicated manufacturing facility when the structure must be built around a specific production process with heavy machinery and line-led layouts.

Can a prefab industrial building have separate rooms and zones?

Yes. Unlike an open shed, it is partitioned at the factory into distinct zones — production floor, store, and office — with a mezzanine option to add area over the office or store without expanding the footprint.

Get a Quote for Your Prefab Industrial Building

Tell us your covered area, clear height, and operation type, and we'll configure a building and price it.

Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 · WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
short_description:
60×36×14 ft finished industrial building — multi-room, steel-frame, factory-built.
Partitioned production, store & office zones in one structure. Configured to your span and clear height, then installed on site.
Size / Capacity
60×36×14 ft, 2,160 sq ft
Frame / Panel
Steel frame · PUF panels
Price / Delivery
₹24,25,000 · 15–21 days
Floor Load / Relocations
Heavy-duty · Relocatable
Bangalore · Delhi NCR
